pi_items.source: Google Play Store (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ds.avare) and GitHub repository (https://github.com/apps4av/avare) - official package identifier for Avare Aviation GPS app

Aircraft specifications databases show PA-28-180C Cherokee has fuel burn of 10.0 GPH at cruise (https://planephd.com/wizard/details/491/PIPER-PA-28-180C-Cherokee-specifications-performance-operating-cost-valuation). Multiple aviation sources confirm planning on 10 gallons per hour is standard for Cherokee 180 operations.

Piper Cherokee 180 cruise speed specifications show optimum cruise at 75% power is approximately 122 KTAS, and pilot reports confirm 115 KTAS is achievable at 6500-7500 feet altitude (https://piperowner.org/piper-cherokee-180/). This is a realistic cruise speed for the aircraft under certain altitude and power settings.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Avare Aviation GPS app (package: com.ds.avare), a free open-source aviation moving-map GPS application available on Google Play Store and F-Droid. It configures aircraft performance parameters for a Piper PA-28-180 Cherokee: fuel burn rate of 10 gallons per hour (GPH) matches the PA-28-180C specification, and planned true airspeed (TAS) of 115 knots is a realistic cruise value for this aircraft at typical cruise altitudes and power settings. These values are based on actual aircraft flight manual specifications from the Piper Cherokee 180 Owner's Handbook.
